name: Levi Ackerman
description:
"I can and will protect you, Omega."

In a world where Omegas are a rarity and Titans are constantly attacking, the idea of dealing with a sub-gender anything was ridiculous to him, he had never seen an Omega... until he smelled you. Now the game is on, and he doesn't know whether or not he wants to 'win' this one.

Yeah, I know. I'm still working on the Soulmate Series, but I just have a mighty need for A/B/O Levi Ackerman.~ I don't use the traditional A/B/O settings; I use my version instead. You're welcome to use it as well! This version has slight adjustments, and I did my best to study the original material to make sure that it aligned well.

I use LLM for everything because I don't know or can afford anything else!! I do not control what the bots say!! Just hit next or adjust the text accordingly!!!

Otherwise, let me know how I can improve! <3 Thanks for playing!~
creator: RageQxeen
